description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in diamond-patterned shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a weathered, muted stucco with stone trim accents around the windows and door. The front facade features a single wooden door with a stone frame and a small set of concrete steps leading up to it, flanked by one window on each side. The side and rear walls each have two symmetrically placed windows, all with matching stone trim. The roof shows signs of moss and aging, giving the house a slightly rustic, lived-in appearance. The overall structure is compact and simple, with no visible porches or decorative overhangs.
description: A compact, single-story house with a steep gable roof, stone-trimmed windows, and a weathered stucco exterior. The front features a wooden door with steps and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, stone steps, and one window on each side of the door.
description_view_1: Side gable view with two windows and the visible edge of the front steps; no door present.
description_view_2: Rear view with two symmetrically placed windows and no entryway or steps.
description_view_3: Opposite side gable view, mirroring the other side with two windows and no door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with stone trim, accessed by a small set of concrete steps, no porch or overhang.
